recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
recommendations.overview: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a violent and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. Jake's family must fight for

recommendations.title: Meg 2: The Trench
recommendations.overview: An exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean of a daring research team spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival.

recommendations.title: Daredevil vs. Spider-Man
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Action, Crime, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Man and Daredevil team up to fight Kingpin.

recommendations.title: The Prize of Peril
recommendations.overview: In a futuristic society, contestants pit their survival skills against each other in a fight to the death for cash prizes, and the contest is aired live on television.

recommendations.title: Underwater
recommendations.overview: After an earthquake destroys their underwater station, six researchers must navigate two miles along the dangerous, unknown depths of the ocean floor to make it to safety in a race against time.

recommendations.title: Breathe
recommendations.overview: Air-supply is scarce in the near future, forcing a mother and daughter to fight for survival when two strangers arrive desperate for an oxygenated haven.

recommendations.title: Deep Rising
recommendations.overview: A group of heavily armed hijackers board a luxury ocean liner in the South Pacific Ocean to loot it, only to do battle with a series of large-sized, tentacled, man-eating sea creatures who have taken over the ship first.

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games
recommendations.overview: In a dystopian society where the Capitol forces each district to send two young tributes to fight to the death in a televised spectacle, a girl volunteers to take her sister’s place, setting the stage for a struggle of survival and defiance.

recommendations.title: Pacific Rim
